properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You've prayed a thousand prayers but still the answer hasn't come And a thousand hopes left broken, have left you all but numb I can't begin to tell you why He's asking you to wait But here in the silence, keep holding on to Faith

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cause The God I know Can still move mountains The God I Know Still calms the raging sea He holds you safely in His arms And He won't let go That's the God I know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our God is always near to those who call upon His name And He said that He'd be with us, When we're walking through the flames So tell your heart to trust Him In this moment give Him praise Lift a hallelujah Cause He will make a way

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The God I know (I know) Can still move mountains The God I Know (I know) Still calms the raging sea He holds you safely in his arms And He won't let go That's the God I know

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've seen Him move so many times before And if there's one thing that I know for sure (I know for sure)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The God I Know (I know) Can still move mountains The God I know (I know) Still calms the raging sea He holds you safely in His arms And He won't let go (He won't let go) (He won't let go) That's the God I Know
